26914.title: Bad Move
26914.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

26915.title: Unforgotten
26915.description: Detectives Cassie and Sunny begin to find out a bit more about who David Walker was through speaking to his ex-wife Tessa.

26916.title: Call the Midwife
26916.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

26917.title: The Kettering Incident
26917.description: The town is in crisis with the discovery of toxic water. Anna is questioned by Fergus and Dutch after her fingerprints are discovered on evidence relating to the crime scene.

26918.title: Unforgotten
26918.description: Detectives Cassie and Sunny begin to find out a bit more about who David Walker was through speaking to his ex-wife Tessa.

26919.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26919.description: When Hyacinth volunteers to help with a senior citizens' day trip to the coast, she has to enter into the spirit of things rather more than she had envisaged.

26920.title: Bargain Hunt
26920.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

26921.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26921.description: When a stressed care home owner falls to her death, Frank and Lu encounter hapless care assistants and surprisingly spirited geriatrics.

26922.title: Bargain Hunt
26922.description: The bargain hunters are racing around the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Charlie Ross is in the driving seat and he is joined by experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant. Before heading over to the auction in Lichfield, Charlie has a pit stop to find out about the fascinating military history of Cannock Chase.

26923.title: Bad Move
26923.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

26924.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26924.description: When Hyacinth volunteers to help with a senior citizens' day trip to the coast, she has to enter into the spirit of things rather more than she had envisaged.

26925.title: Doctors
26925.description: Al reluctantly leads a shared patient consultation, and Bear may be out of his depth. A radio host, a graphic novelist and a timid man have something in common.

26926.title: EastEnders
26926.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

26927.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26927.description: When a stressed care home owner falls to her death, Frank and Lu encounter hapless care assistants and surprisingly spirited geriatrics.

Charlie Ross is in the driving seat and he is joined by experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant. Before heading over to the auction in Lichfield, Charlie has a pit stop to find out about the fascinating military history of Cannock Chase.

26929.title: Impossible
26929.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

26930.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
26930.description: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, Cornwall. When Gareth and Frances Jenkins bought an ugly-looking pebble-dashed bungalow, they had little idea of the house's astonishing history.
26930.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen

26932.description: When Hyacinth volunteers to help with a senior citizens' day trip to the coast, she has to enter into the spirit of things rather more than she had envisaged.

26933.title: Bargain Hunt
26933.description: Anita Manning presents from the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. A team of best friends take on a married couple to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.

26934.description: Al reluctantly leads a shared patient consultation, and Bear may be out of his depth. A radio host, a graphic novelist and a timid man have something in common.

26937.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26937.description: Frank and Lu race against the clock when an undertaker is given only 24 hours to live by two mysterious hitmen.

26938.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
26938.description: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, Cornwall. When Gareth and Frances Jenkins bought an ugly-looking pebble-dashed bungalow, they had little idea of the house's astonishing history.
26938.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen

26939.title: Bad Move
26939.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

26940.title: Keeping Up Appearances
26940.description: Super snob Hyacinth suddenly has a lot on her hands - attending the Mayor's fancy dress ball and getting to know an important new neighbour.

26941.title: Doctors
26941.description: Al reluctantly leads a shared patient consultation, and Bear may be out of his depth. A radio host, a graphic novelist and a timid man have something in common.

26942.title: EastEnders
26942.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

26943.title: Impossible
26943.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

26944.title: Bargain Hunt
26944.description: Charlie Ross presents from the Lincolnshire Antiques and Home show. Helping out the teams are experts Raj Bisram and Kate Bliss. Meanwhile, Charlie hears about a devastating extreme weather event that destroyed Louth in 1920.

26945.title: Doctors
26945.description: Valerie sees omens everywhere, and Bear can't see what's in front of him. Zara has to step in when a one-night stand has disastrous consequences.

26946.title: EastEnders
26946.description: Callum can't open up to Ben, Kat comes up with a business idea, and Vi meddles in the Highway marriage.

26947.title: Antiques Roadshow
26947.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

26948.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators
26948.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

26949.title: Our Girl
26949.description: With the training exercise now having become a fully-fledged rescue mission, Georgie and James are compelled to use every ounce of cunning and training to evade capture while they wait to be rescued. As Bones and his Special Forces unit lead the effort to rescue them without attracting unwanted attention, Georgie and James, helped by local teenager Ezra, must overcome seemingly insurmountable odds.

26950.title: Rillington Place
26950.description: After the strain of Timothy Evans's trial, Christie finds it increasingly difficult to maintain the charade. As his marriage breaks down, he embarks upon a course of action which finally reveals his true nature to the world.
